channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.0
item.description:
• New: live transcription — watch your words appear in the HUD while you dictate (Settings → Dictation, off by default)
  • New: on macOS 26, choose between Apple's built-in speech engine and Parakeet in Settings; fresh installs start on the Apple engine, so dictation works with nothing to download
  • Lighter: speech models now unload after ~10 idle minutes and reload in seconds (setting, on by default), and keyboard shortcuts no longer inspect every keystroke system-wide
  • Fixed: meeting recording could hang and fail to start with a USB or wireless-dongle headset
  • Fixed: a transcription failure could permanently delete a meeting's audio; it is now kept and retried
  • Fixed: a failed dictation now keeps its audio in History for retry instead of losing your words
  • Fixed: retrying a meeting transcription no longer silently drops the other side of the conversation
  • Fixed: quitting mid-dictation no longer leaves the system volume muted
  • Also: a warning when the disk fills up mid-recording, updates no longer install while a dictation is still transcribing, more useful AI summaries, and many smaller fixes
